creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 220465
PyQt5 to 5.15.2, sip to 5.5.0, py-qtbuilder to 1.6.0 and py-qt5-sip to 12.8.1 for exp-run

Hi there

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update devel/py-qt5, devel/py-qtbuilder, devel/py-qt5-sip and devel/py-sip to the newest versions.

Thanks,

Loïc
